subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Some time hath elapsed since correspondence with thee was delayed, and this owing to circumstances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چندی بود که در مکاتبه با شما تاخیر افتاد و این نظر بمواقع
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
